message:
feat(io): add P2C-009 phase-E unit property evidence artifact

Document successful completion of FNP-P2C-009 evidence validation phase
for numpy npy/npz IO contract validation subsystem:

- 18 unit property tests passing (exceeds minimum of 12 required)
- 128 magic header property seed checks with deterministic traceability
- 10 reason code registry entries for fail-closed policy decisions
- 14 structured log required fields enforced in IOLogRecord

All quality gates passing: cargo fmt, cargo check, cargo clippy, ubs.

Validates that strict/hardened mode policies enforce deterministic class
behavior with bounded validation overhead for IO operations including
magic/version prefix, header schema, dtype descriptor codec, contiguous
and non-contiguous write paths, payload count/reshape reads, pickle
policy gating, memmap safety, load dispatch routing, and NPZ archive
member validation.

Completes phase-E (evidence) for packet FNP-P2C-009, complementing the
phase-D skeleton implementation from commit c117674.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": 1,
+  "packet_id": "FNP-P2C-009",
+  "subtask_id": "FNP-P2C-009-E",
+  "status": "pass",
+  "coverage_floors": {
+    "io_unit_property_tests_min": 12,
+    "io_unit_property_tests_actual": 18,
+    "magic_header_property_seed_checks_min": 128,
+    "magic_header_property_seed_checks_actual": 128,
+    "reason_code_registry_entries_min": 10,
+    "reason_code_registry_entries_actual": 10,
+    "structured_log_required_fields_min": 14,
+    "structured_log_required_fields_actual": 14
+  },
+  "suites": [
+    {
+      "suite": "fnp-io::tests",
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo test -p fnp-io",
+      "result": "pass",
+      "pass_count": 18,
+      "fail_count": 0
+    }
+  ],
+  "quality_gates": [
+    {
+      "command": "cargo fmt --check",
+      "result": "pass"
+    },
+    {
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets",
+      "result": "pass"
+    },
+    {
+      "command": "rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings",
+      "result": "pass"
+    },
+    {
+      "command": "ubs --only=rust crates/fnp-io/src/lib.rs",
+      "result": "pass",
+      "critical_findings": 0
+    }
+  ],
+  "artifacts": [
+    "crates/fnp-io/src/lib.rs",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/contract_table.md",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/implementation_plan.md",
+    "artifacts/phase2c/FNP-P2C-009/unit_property_evidence.json"
+  ],
+  "notes": [
+    "Structured log fields enforced by IOLogRecord: ts_utc, suite_id, test_id, packet_id, fixture_id, mode, seed, input_digest, output_digest, env_fingerprint, artifact_refs, duration_ms, outcome, reason_code.",
+    "Property coverage includes deterministic write-contract grid checks with explicit seed-traceability in looped assertions.",
+    "Policy/budget boundaries are validated for header-size cap, dispatch-retry cap, archive-member/size caps, and memmap validation retries."
+  ]
+}
